name: Wolves at the Gate
description: A pair of lean wolves prowl before Ashford's timber gate, their silver pelts bristling in the morning chill. The village watch calls for aid — the beasts have grown bold with hunger, and the lambing pens lie just beyond the threshold.
failureConsequence: The wolves scatter into the fields, dragging a bleating lamb with them. The villagers eye you with quiet disappointment as you nurse a bitten arm.
